name: themekit
summary: A token-driven, brand-neutral SwiftUI design system. Every color / radius / spacing / type style is a token resolved at runtime from the active Theme; components never hardcode a color.
rules: Read the theme via `@Environment(\.theme) private var theme`; inject `.environment(Theme.shared)` once at the root.
Never hardcode a color — use `theme.text(.textPrimary)`, `theme.background(.bgWhite)`, or a `SemanticColor`.
Put required content/bindings/actions in `init`; set variants, sizes, flags, colors and callbacks with chainable modifiers.
Sizes use `.controlSize(_:)`; disabled state uses `.disabled(_:)`; accessibility id uses `.a11yID(_:)`.
Recolor everything with `Theme.shared.applyGenerated(primaryHex:)` or a preset: `ThemePreset.named("dracula")?.apply()`.

modifiers.doc: Stable accessibility identifier, forwarded to the kit's a11y infrastructure.

modifiers.name: color(_:)
modifiers.doc: Semantic color token driving the fill/accent ladder (R4).

modifiers.name: fullWidth(_:)
modifiers.doc: Stretch to the available width.

modifiers.name: loading(_:)
modifiers.doc: Swap the label for a spinner and block taps while `on`.

modifiers.name: shape(_:)
modifiers.doc: Corner treatment: rounded / pill / circle / square (circle & square are icon-only).

modifiers.name: size(_:)
modifiers.doc: Control size: xxsmall … large.

modifiers.name: variant(_:)
modifiers.doc: Visual treatment: solid / soft / outline / ghost / link.

modifiers.name: a11yID(_:)
modifiers.doc: Sets the accessibility-identifier namespace for this component (its sub-elements get `"<id>.<element>"`).

modifiers.doc: Swap the knob for a spinner and block interaction while `on`.

components.name: TimeField

modifiers.name: a11yID(_:)
modifiers.doc: Stable accessibility identifier, forwarded to the kit's a11y infrastructure.

modifiers.name: clearable(_:)
modifiers.doc: Show a trailing clear button when a time is set.

modifiers.name: hourCycle(_:)
modifiers.doc: Force the displayed hour cycle (12 / 24-hour) or follow the locale (default).

modifiers.name: icon(_:)
modifiers.doc: Leading SF Symbol shown inside the field (defaults to `clock`; pass `nil` to hide).

modifiers.name: infoMessages(_:)
modifiers.doc: Validation / info messages rendered under the field (drives the border state).

modifiers.name: locale(_:)
modifiers.doc: Override the formatting locale (defaults to the environment locale).

modifiers.name: minuteInterval(_:)
modifiers.doc: Snap the selected minute to the nearest multiple of `minutes` (e.g.

modifiers.name: placeholder(_:)
modifiers.doc: Placeholder shown while no time is selected.

modifiers.name: range(_:)
modifiers.doc: Restrict the picker to a selectable time range.

components.name: Timeline
components.init: init(_ items: [Timeline.Item])

modifiers.name: axis(_:)
modifiers.doc: Rail orientation: vertical (default) or horizontal.

modifiers.name: mode(_:)
modifiers.doc: Content placement around the rail: left / right / alternate (vertical only).

modifiers.name: pending(_:)
modifiers.doc: Trailing loading ("pending") node with its label.

modifiers.name: reversed(_:)
modifiers.doc: Flip the item order.

modifiers.doc: Sets the accessibility-identifier namespace for this component (its sub-elements get `"<id>.<element>"`).

components.name: TreeSelect
components.doc: Hierarchical (nested) select with expand/collapse and multi-selection.
components.init: init(_ label: String? = nil, nodes: [TreeNode], selection: Binding<Set<String>>, initiallyExpanded: Set<String> = [])

modifiers.name: cascade(_:)
modifiers.doc: Parent ↔ child cascade selection with tri-state (indeterminate) parents.

modifiers.name: loading(_:)
modifiers.doc: Swap the node list for a loading row while `on`.

modifiers.name: nodeEnabled(_:)
modifiers.doc: Per-node enabled predicate — disabled nodes can't be toggled.

modifiers.name: placeholder(_:)
modifiers.doc: Placeholder shown in the field when nothing is selected.

modifiers.name: searchable(_:)
modifiers.doc: Show an inline search field that filters the visible nodes.

components.name: VideoPlayerView
components.doc: Inline video on AVKit (reference `InlineVideoPlayerView`): autoplay, loop, mute, aspect-fill, and active-gating (only the visible item plays).
components.init: init(_ url: URL?, progress: Binding<Double>? = nil, isMuted: Binding<Bool>? = nil, onTap: (() -> Void)? = nil, isActive: Binding<Bool> = .constant(true))

modifiers.name: autoplay(_:)
modifiers.doc: Whether the video starts playing on appear (default true).

modifiers.name: loop(_:)
modifiers.doc: Whether playback loops back to the start (default true).

modifiers.name: muted(_:)
modifiers.doc: Whether the audio starts muted (default true — required for iOS inline autoplay).

modifiers.name: muteToggle(_:)
modifiers.doc: Shows a mute/unmute toggle button overlay.

modifiers.name: tapToToggle(_:)
modifiers.doc: Whether tapping the video toggles play/pause.
